abi: error AssetRegistryStalePriceData(uint256 updatedAt, uint256 currentTime, uint256 maxStale)
event AssetAdded(address indexed asset, (address asset, bool isSupported, address priceFeed, uint256 maxStalePeriod) config)
event AssetUpdated(address indexed asset, (address asset, bool isSupported, address priceFeed, uint256 maxStalePeriod) config)
event OwnershipTransferStarted(address indexed previousOwner, address indexed newOwner)
event OwnershipTransferred(address indexed previousOwner, address indexed newOwner)
function convertFromUnderlying(address _asset, uint256 _amount) view returns (uint256 amount)
function convertToUnderlying(address _asset, uint256 _amount) view returns (uint256 amount)
function getAssetConfig(address asset) view returns ((address asset, bool isSupported, address priceFeed, uint256 maxStalePeriod) config)
function isAssetSupported(address asset) view returns (bool supported)
function setAssetConfig((address asset, bool isSupported, address priceFeed, uint256 maxStalePeriod) config)
function upgradeToAndCall(address newImplementation, bytes data) payable
